prompt: Run sdlc-test in SYSTEM mode (/sdlc:test) against the complete docs/ chain in this project (PRD.yaml, DATA-MODEL.yaml, ARCH.yaml, plus API.yaml + API__* and UX.yaml + UX__* enrichers — all status: complete). The product is a small web task tracker (tinytrack) with a weekly digest. Write docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml and run validate_schema.py until it validates. Cross-container workflows WKF-001/002/003 must each be covered by a system test (e2e or contract) or deferred via a WRN-NNN. The system file carries the global policy (pyramid_targets, coverage_threshold.line_pct, mock_policy, fixture_strategy). Do NOT author per-container unit tests here.

assertions.text: WKF-001, WKF-002, WKF-003 each appear in a test's covers or are WRN-NNN deferred
Global policy present: pyramid_targets, coverage_threshold.line_pct, mock_policy, fixture_strategy
The digest double-send / idempotency risk (no duplicate email on retry) is addressed by some test OR a reasoned WRN-NNN deferral
The 'digest run when a team has zero open tasks' edge case is addressed by some test OR a reasoned WRN-NNN deferral
METRIC: total number of TST-NNN tests in the system file
